ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Mar-14-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Motion To Vacate Sanctions Imposed By The Civil Case Mgmt Dept.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Legalmatch.com's Motion to vacate sanctions imposed by the Civil Case Management Department on 10/24/2006 to Ken alan Lamance, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332 (212)
